title: UK stocks are beating Wall Street — but the Iran war is putting the winning streak at risk
summary_full: The FTSE 100's outperformance of its U.S. counterparts is on shaky ground as the conflict in the Middle East drags on.
summary_public: The FTSE 100's outperformance of its U.S. counterparts is on shaky ground as the conflict in the Middle East drags on.
